title: neblinathamnus brasiliensis
intro: Neblinathamnus brasiliensis, also known as the Brazilian neblina, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Amazon region, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits associated with Neblinathamnus brasiliensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or boiling them to create a medicinal tea.
